title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Gateway Distriparks

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Gateway Distriparks
jsonLd.description:
Join the Gateway Distriparks family as a Logistics Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Gateway Distriparks:
Gateway Distriparks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gateway Distriparks!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
